hero.subtitle: AI-assisted conversational English immersion with a native US software engineer. Stop translating in your head. Start thinking in English.
who.title: This is for you if…
who.desc: You already studied grammar. Now you need to actually speak.
who.card1: You understand but freeze when speaking
who.card1.desc: Your comprehension is good, but speaking feels impossible. This is the most common problem — and the one I solve.
who.card2.desc: You think in Spanish and translate to English in your head. We'll train your brain to think directly in English.
who.card3: You want remote work with US teams
who.card3.desc: The opportunity is there. The only thing holding you back is confidence in English conversations.
who.card4: You need English for interviews or meetings
who.card4.desc: Job interviews, standups, client calls — we practice the exact situations you'll face.
who.card5: You're a developer or tech worker
who.card5.desc: Technical English, AI terminology, startup culture — I speak your language and can help with the specific vocabulary you need.
who.card6: You're tired of traditional English classes
who.card6.desc: No textbooks, no grammar drills, no repetitive worksheets. Just real conversation with a native speaker.
focus.title: English first. Communication first.
focus.desc: Real conversations, not textbook exercises. Every session is designed to build confidence and natural speech.
focus.item1.desc: Train your brain to think in English directly. No more mental translation.
focus.item2.desc: A relaxed environment where mistakes are normal and expected. Confidence comes from practice.
focus.item3.desc: Native speed, natural expressions, connected speech — the English you actually hear in real life.
focus.item4.desc: Practice the exact conversations you'll have in interviews, standups, and client calls.
focus.item5.desc: Slack messages, Zoom calls, bug reports, presentations — English for your actual work.
focus.item6.desc: Sound more natural and be understood effortlessly. Focus on clarity, not perfection.
how.title: Every session follows a proven structure
how.desc: Five phases designed to maximize speaking time and build real confidence.
how.step1.title: Warmup Conversation
how.step1.desc: We start with simple daily-life discussion. Relaxed speaking practice to get you comfortable and thinking in English from minute one.
how.step2.title: Focus Topic
how.step2.desc: Job interviews, remote work, software development, travel, meetings, customer communication, gaming, daily life — we pick what matters to you.
how.step3.title: Correction Pass
how.step3.desc: Only a few important corrections. We focus on natural speech patterns, not perfection. Confidence comes first.
how.step4.title: Roleplay Practice
how.step4.desc: Interviews, meetings, restaurants, customer support, talking with coworkers, technical explanations — we simulate real situations.
how.step5.title: Practical Homework
how.step5.desc: Voice recordings, YouTube videos, describing your daily activities in English — small tasks that keep you immersed between sessions.
why.title: Why this approach works better
why.desc: Most people already studied grammar. The real problem is different.
why.point1.title: You already know the grammar
why.point1.desc: Most English learners have years of grammar study. The problem isn't knowledge — it's putting it into practice under pressure.
why.point2.title: Fear is the real barrier
why.point2.desc: Students freeze because they're afraid of making mistakes. Our relaxed sessions remove that pressure so you can actually speak.
why.point3.title: Mental translation slows you down
why.point3.desc: When you translate every sentence in your head, you speak slowly and sound unnatural. Immersion trains your brain to think directly in English.
why.point4.title: AI support removes embarrassment
why.point4.desc: AI tools help when you get stuck — providing translations and explanations so the session stays in English without awkward pauses.
why.point5.title: Conversation builds fluency faster
why.point5.desc: Constant conversational exposure is how humans naturally learn language. More speaking time = faster progress. Period.
tech.title: English for Tech & Remote Work
tech.desc: A specialized track for developers, IT workers, and remote professionals who need to communicate effectively with US teams.
tech.card1.title: Slack & async communication
tech.card1.desc: Write clear messages, participate in threads, and communicate effectively without being in the same timezone.
tech.card2.title: Zoom calls & meetings
tech.card2.desc: Speak up in standups, contribute to discussions, and handle Q&A with confidence.
tech.card3.title: Job interviews
tech.card3.desc: Technical interviews, behavioral questions, salary negotiations — practice the exact conversations you'll face.
tech.card4.title: Explaining bugs & technical issues
tech.card4.desc: Describe problems clearly, propose solutions, and communicate technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
tech.card5.title: Presentations & demos
tech.card5.desc: Present your work, demo features, and handle questions from US-based teams and clients.
tech.card6.title: Startup culture & AI terminology
tech.card6.desc: Understand startup jargon, AI/ML terminology, and the informal communication style of tech companies.
relaxed.title: Relaxed sessions. Real progress.
relaxed.desc: Lessons are conversational and adapted to your pace. Mistakes are normal and expected. The goal is real communication and growing confidence — not perfection.
faq.title: Common questions
faq.a1: No. Sessions are adapted to your level. The only requirement is that you want to speak more.
faq.a2: Yes — via Google Meet, Zoom, or Discord. Your choice.
faq.q3: Can you help with job interviews?
faq.a3: Yes. Interview preparation is one of my main specialties. We practice the exact questions you'll face.
faq.q4: Is this like a traditional English class?
faq.a4: No. There are no textbooks, grammar drills, or worksheets. Every session is conversation-based with real-world topics.
faq.a5: If you can understand basic English, you're ready. We focus on speaking from day one.
faq.q7: How does AI help during sessions?
faq.a7: AI tools provide quick translations and explanations when you get stuck, so we can keep the conversation flowing in English.
cta.title: Ready to think in English?
cta.desc: Book your free consultation and start speaking with real confidence.
footer.desc: AI-assisted English immersion by Mauricio Tellez — native US English speaker and software engineer.

techPage.intro.title: Why tech workers need different English
techPage.intro.desc: Traditional English classes teach you to order food at a restaurant. But you need to explain a bug in a standup, write clear Slack messages, and handle job interviews with US companies. That's what we focus on.

sg.title: Your English Fluency Path
sg.heading: Your English Fluency Path
sg.desc: This program is conversation-first and confidence-first. No textbooks. No grammar drills. Just real practice with a native speaker.
sg.core.title: Core Ideas
sg.core1: English first — we keep sessions in English as much as possible
sg.core2: Communication before perfection — being understood matters more than being perfect
sg.core3: Speak even when imperfect — mistakes are how you learn
sg.core4: AI can help when stuck — quick translations so we stay in English
sg.core5: Practical lessons, not textbook-based — real conversations about real topics
sg.core6: The goal is to stop translating every sentence in your head
sg.structure.title: Lesson Structure
sg.struct1.title: Warmup Conversation
sg.struct1.desc: Simple daily-life discussion to get comfortable.
sg.struct2.title: Guided Conversation
sg.struct2.desc: Main speaking practice on a chosen topic.
sg.struct3.title: Vocabulary Expansion
sg.struct3.desc: Learn useful words and phrases for your situation.
sg.struct4.title: Roleplay
sg.struct4.desc: Practice real-world situations like interviews or meetings.
sg.struct5.title: Correction Pass
sg.struct5.desc: Light corrections on the most important issues only.
sg.struct6.title: Homework
sg.struct6.desc: Small practical tasks to keep you immersed between sessions.
sg.levels.title: Your Level Path
sg.levels.desc: After your free consultation, we'll place you at the right level. Here's what each level looks like:
sg.a0.title: A0 — Survival English
sg.a0.desc: Build comfort with basic English sounds, words, and simple responses.
sg.a1.title: A1 — Basic Conversation
sg.a1.desc: Build basic conversational flow with simple sentences.
sg.a2.title: A2 — Everyday English
sg.a2.desc: Increase speed, listening comfort, and conversational stamina.
sg.b1.title: B1 — Professional English
sg.b1.desc: Build professional communication confidence for work.
sg.b2.title: B2+ — Advanced / Tech Fluency
sg.b2.desc: Refine fluency, nuance, rhythm, and professional presence.
sg.cta.title: After signup, you receive a level guide and practice plan.

tg.title: Tutor OS
tg.heading: Tutor OS
tg.desc: Operational guide for running lessons. Student speaking time matters most.
tg.ratio.title: Target Ratio
tg.principles.title: Core Principles
tg.lesson.title: 60-Minute Lesson Structure
tg.l1.title: Warmup — 5 min
tg.l2.title: Guided Conversation — 15 min
tg.l3.title: Vocabulary Expansion — 10 min
tg.l3.desc: Purpose: add useful words and phrases.
tg.l4.title: Roleplay — 15 min
tg.l5.title: Corrections & Coaching — 10 min
tg.l6.title: Homework & Wrap-up — 5 min
tg.freeze.title: When Students Freeze
tg.freeze.example: Tutor: "Did you work today or rest today?" → Student answers with one choice → Tutor expands: "Good. Say: I worked today."
tg.correction.title: Correction Strategy
tg.correction.desc: Do not correct every mistake. During conversation: take notes, let student finish, keep conversation moving.
tg.correction.pass: Correction Pass: Pick only 2–5 items — one pronunciation issue, one grammar pattern, one natural phrase, one vocabulary upgrade.
tg.correction.format: Format: Student said → Better → Practice with variations.
tg.correction.example: Student: "I have 30 years." → Better: "I am 30 years old." → Practice: "I am 30 years old." / "My brother is 25 years old." / "She is 40 years old."
tg.roleplay.title: Roleplay Bank
tg.assessment.title: Placement Assessment
tg.assessment.desc: 15-minute assessment. Evaluate: comfort speaking, vocabulary range, listening ability, sentence formation, confidence, translation dependence, professional needs.
tg.assessment.q2: What do you do for work?
tg.assessment.q4: Why do you want to improve your English?
tg.assessment.q5: Describe a problem you solved recently.
tg.assessment.q6: What is difficult for you in English?
tg.assessment.guide.title: Placement Guide
tg.assessment.a0: A0: single words, very limited comprehension

about.pageTitle: About Mauricio Tellez | AI-Assisted English Immersion Coach
about.title: Meet Mauricio Tellez
about.subtitle: Native US English speaker and software engineer — raised in California, now living in Mexico City.
about.headline: Native fluency meets software engineering
about.p1: I'm a software engineer raised in California, now living in Mexico City. I help professionals become comfortable speaking English through AI-assisted conversational immersion — not traditional grammar lessons.
about.p2: My students are developers, remote workers, job seekers, and anyone who needs English for real situations. I've seen firsthand how strong communication skills open doors — better jobs, international teams, and real confidence.
about.p3: Whether you're preparing for a job interview, need to speak up in standups, or just want to feel confident in English conversations — I'll help you get there.
about.highlightText: No textbooks. No grammar drills. Just real conversation.
about.approachDesc: Most people already studied grammar. The real problem is fear and lack of speaking practice. My sessions use AI tools to help when you get stuck — providing quick translations and explanations so we can keep the conversation flowing in English. The result: less anxiety, more speaking time, faster progress.
about.fit1: ✓ You understand English but freeze when speaking
about.fit2: ✓ You mentally translate every sentence before saying it
about.fit3: ✓ You want to work remotely with US teams
about.fit4: ✓ You need English for interviews, meetings, or presentations
about.fit5: ✓ You prefer real conversation over textbook exercises
about.ctaDesc: Book a free 20-minute consultation to discuss your goals.
pricing.title: Simple pricing, real results
pricing.subtitle: Pay in Mexican Pesos (MXN). No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.
book.pageDesc: Book your free 20-minute consultation with Mauricio Tellez.
book.title: Free Consultation
book.subtitle: Schedule your session and find out if you qualify for a free class.
book.calendlySub: 20 minutes to get to know each other and discuss your goals.
privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.collectDesc: We only collect the information needed to provide the service: your name, email, and payment data (processed entirely by Stripe).
privacy.useDesc: To schedule classes, communicate about sessions, and process payments. We never share your data with third parties except Stripe for payments and Calendly for scheduling.
privacy.retainDesc: We keep your information only while you're an active student. You can request deletion at any time.
footer.desc: Real conversation with a native US English speaker and software engineer.
